BTC.analyst: SHORT adayi: 4h+1d down -> trend asagi, short counter-trend degil. Entry 59827, stop 61991 (+~1 ATR), target 56582 (-1.5 ATR), R:R ~1.5, confidence low. ANCAK RSI 22.64 + MACDh -21 asiri uzamis, islem ufku range.
